case_title: THE HERTZ CORPORATION, A CORPORATION vs. SODIA, MITCHELL B. et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HERTZ CORPORATION, A CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SODIA, MITCHELL B. $2,342.13 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,342.13, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT IS $3842.13 MIMUS DEFT'S PAYMENTS OF $1500, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $2342.13, WHICH IS INCLUDE ALL PREJUDGMENT INTEREST, ATTY'S FEES, AND COSTS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
